title: Hieracium × variifurcum
intro: Hieracium × variifurcum, also known as the hybrid hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, providing relief for various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and skin conditions. Bioactive constituents of the plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Hieracium × variifurcum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
